taxonomy: Triorchis strictus is classified as a species of parasitic flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as broomrapes. It is a part of the genus Triorchis, which consists of several species of parasitic plants. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Africa. Within the family Orobanchaceae, Triorchis strictus is likely to be closely related to other broomrape species. Further classification may involve more detailed analysis of its morphology and genetic characteristics.
